leadText: The Oval Stone (Japanese: まんまるいし Oval Stone) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It is an Evolution item that allows Happiny to evolve into Chansey.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] Causes Happiny to evolve into Chansey when leveled up during the day while holding it. This consumes the Oval Stone. In Pokémon Legends: Arceus only, Happiny evolves into Chansey when exposed to an Oval Stone during the day.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the player offers both a Sun Ribbon and Oval Stone at Luminous Spring , Happiny can be evolved into Chansey . This consumes the Sun Ribbon and Oval Stone. If thrown, it will deal 1 damage (2 if sticky ). Using this item in a dungeon will consume it, with no effect.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve. It is shaped like an egg. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokémon evolve. It's as round as a Pokémon Egg. LA A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokémon evolve. It is round and smooth. S V A peculiar stone that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It is round and smooth.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S A surprisingly smooth, rounded stone. It allows a certain kind of Pokémon to evolve.
